inspirations.lesson: Use real repository/task environments with hidden tests and execution-based scoring.
inspirations.name: SWE-bench

inspirations.lesson: Guard against flawed tests, underspecified tasks, and contamination before trusting score movement.
inspirations.name: SWE-bench Verified audit

inspirations.lesson: Mix reasoning, multimodality, browsing, and tool use while keeping questions human-solvable.
inspirations.name: GAIA

inspirations.lesson: Evaluate multi-turn user-agent-tool interaction against final state and reliability across trials.
inspirations.name: tau-bench

inspirations.lesson: Use realistic, reproducible web environments and long-horizon functional correctness.
inspirations.name: WebArena

inspirations.lesson: Require execution-based validation for real computer-use tasks, not screenshot-only claims.
inspirations.name: OSWorld

inspirations.lesson: Slice long-term reasoning, decision-making, and instruction following across multiple environments.
inspirations.name: AgentBench
